ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content of the item */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Dairy, Soft Drinks, Meat) */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the item */,
  "item_perishability" TEXT /* Indicates whether the item is perishable or non-perishable */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the item */,
  "item_packaging" TEXT /* Type of packaging (e.g., plastic, cardboard, glass) */,
  "item_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the item (for perishable items) */,
  "item_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "item_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the item belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_subcategory_id") REFERENCES item_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the outlet */,
  "outlet_establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the outlet was established */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet */,
  "outlet_location_type" TEXT /* Location type of the outlet (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 3) */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of the outlet (e.g., Supermarket Type1, Grocery Store) */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* Email address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet manager */,
  "outlet_manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the outlet manager */,
  "outlet_website" TEXT /* Website of the outlet (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_outlet_sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the item is being sold */,
  "item_outlet_sales" REAL /* Sales figure for the item at the outlet */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the item was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_outlet_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_outlet_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_categories_category_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_parent_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subcategory (for hierarchical subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_subcategories_subcategory_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_parent_id") REFERENCES item_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet the location belongs to */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 3) */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the outlet */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City where the outlet is located */,
  "location_state" TEXT /* State where the outlet is located */,
  "location_country" TEXT /* Country where the outlet is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlet_locations_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet the size belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet (e.g., Small, Medium, High) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., 'Small - up to 500 sq ft') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlet_sizes_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_item_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "item_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first item in the interaction */,
  "item_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second item in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., bundle, promotion) */,
  "interaction_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_discount" REAL /* Discount applied due to the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_item_interactions_item_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("item_id_2") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_item_interactions_item_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("item_id_1") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_outlet_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "outlet_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first outlet in the interaction */,
  "outlet_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second outlet in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., co-branding, joint promotion) */,
  "interaction_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_discount" REAL /* Discount applied due to the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlet_outlet_interactions_outlet_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id_2") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlet_outlet_interactions_outlet_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id_1") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on sales (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being forecasted */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the item is being forecasted */,
  "sales_forecast" REAL /* Sales forecast for the item at the outlet */,
  "forecast_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the forecast period */,
  "forecast_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the forecast period */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecasts_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being measured */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales figure for the item */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the item */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the item */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "performance_period" TEXT /* Period for which the performance metrics are calculated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_performance_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet being measured */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales figure for the outlet */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the outlet */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the outlet */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "performance_period" TEXT /* Period for which the performance metrics are calculated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlet_performance_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_category_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being measured */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales figure for the category */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the category */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the category */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metrics */,
  "performance_period" TEXT /* Period for which the performance metrics are calculated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_category_performance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)
